title: Papyrus Oxyrhynchus 1224
source_edition: Grenfell & Hunt 1914, *The Oxyrhynchus Papyri* X. Public domain.
date_of_composition: Manuscript late 3rd or early 4th century CE; underlying text mid-1st century (Crossan) to c. 150 CE (other scholars).
scope_note: Six brief passages on two fragments (Frag 2 recto col 1, col 2; Frag 2 verso col 1, col 2; plus partial duplicates). Two passages parallel canonical synoptic material (Mk 2:17; Mk 9:40 / Lk 9:50) with phrasing showing textual independence from the gospels.
completeness_note: Greek text not yet sourced into this JSON corpus; pending follow-up session.
follow_up_needed: Fetch Greek text from Grenfell & Hunt 1914 (Egypt Exploration Fund) or Kraus, Nicklas & Kruger 2009 *Gospel Fragments* (OUP).
